title: taraxacum albulense
intro: Taraxacum albulense, also known as the lesser dandelion or white dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum albulense include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of arthritis, among others. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum albulense can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
